query:
-- How many contacts are still pending enrichment (project-linked, active projects, non-manual)?
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' OR c.enrichmentStatus IS NULL)
  AND (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR p.lifecycleStatus = 'awarded')
  AND c.enrichmentSource != 'manual'
GROUP BY c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- How many contacts are still pending enrichment (project-linked, active projects, non-manual)?
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' OR c.enrichmentStatus IS NULL)
  AND (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR p.lifecycleStatus = 'awarded')
  AND c.enrichmentSource != 'manual'
GROUP BY c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC;
